creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2012-01-14 19:21:51 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils             Makefile 
  Added files:
    sysutils/tzdialog    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  tzdialog is an ISO-3166 compliant sh(1) implementation of tzsetup(8) based on
  the dialog(1) (or Xdialog(1)) utility for setting the local default timezone.
  
  WWW: http://druidbsd.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             ports/164031
  Submitted by:   Devin Teske <dteske@vicor.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1370    +1 -0      ports/sysutils/Makefile
  1.1       +25 -0     ports/sysutils/tzdialog/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/sysutils/tzdialog/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/sysutils/tzdialog/pkg-descr (new)
